90f6f464ef29edc07e9ee4bb0e09c30875b26351.statement: The elevation constraint specifies that cards receive a 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1) shadow and modals receive a 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.5) shadow.

af1a9483204f6b9e740fb956da516f630250de26.statement: constraint: typography: system-ui sans-serif family, 14px base size (0.875rem), 1.5 line-height, 18px headings (1.125rem)

8e97cf0b05a552c379191b810883b7c08e025f20.statement: constraint: hover states: interactive elements lighten background 10% (use var(--surface1) instead of var(--surface0))

a3096e1d1cac21c13e81424fa0501184d985a967.statement: The layout container shall have a maximum width of 1400 pixels, be centered, and have 24 pixels of padding.

f38fdf44bef331fffde73ab6fbcb04357b13747c.statement: constraint: filter bar: search input, category select, sort field, sort order, and action buttons arranged horizontally in a single row with gap

0ff2ad5ed7692db6600085c1ccc691aec6ddd6ce.statement: constraint: all form inputs and selects must have visible labels - use floating labels or inline label+input pairs where the label text is always visible

a9a415865e6a3636dfe41a51a37c49a3ecb73700.statement: constraint: table: row height comfortable, cell padding 14px horizontal (0.875rem), 1px solid borders between rows

fee028e48be5da21bcb4b40730b136d9d84490dc.statement: constraint: focus states: blue (#89b4fa) outline for accessibility on inputs and buttons

0f2c4a9b67c58a13c0907a757e6d77260278dc83.statement: constraint: dialog/modal: backdrop blur 4px with 60% black overlay, centered content, max-width 500px, max-height 90vh with scroll

27efabcf1751f42f741db6104848e66a53f419a1.statement: constraint: dialog header: flex layout with title (h2, 20px size) and close button (× icon), bottom border 1px solid surface0

395b1907d490767e4f3be19ad3ad3cd6ce79f646.statement: constraint: dialog body: padding 24px (1.5rem), form groups with label above input, 16px margin-bottom between groups

d28957a7190323017083a57a915d1e8df5185a78.statement: The dialog footer shall have a top border of 1px solid surface0, be a flex row with gap, and have right-aligned action buttons.

715c71199f6467d8f796a87aed56539b9979377f.statement: constraint: form layout: inputs full-width within container, two-column grid for related fields (quantity/min-quantity)

61e817b55ac5a43f5a49e08602acfe86a81adc7e.statement: The close button shall be positioned at the top-right, inherit the text color, use a 24px font-size, and have no background.
